name: Memory (Cortex)
description: Cortex memory engine — retrieval, storage, and lifecycle management for evaOS

cortexUrl.description: Cortex API base URL (e.g. http://localhost:8000 or https://your-fly-app.fly.dev)

apiKey.description: Cortex API key (optional for local installs, required for production)

autoRecall.description: Automatically retrieve relevant memories before each agent turn (default: true)

autoCapture.description: Automatically capture conversations to memory after each agent turn (default: true)

shadowMode.description: Shadow mode — capture runs extraction but skips storage (dry-run, default: false)

retrievalBudget.description: Max token budget for retrieved memories (default: 2000)

maxInjectionChars.description: Max characters to inject into context (default: 8000)

retrievalMode.description: Retrieval mode for memory search (default: fast)

showConflicts.description: Show conflict markers in v2 format

showRelations.description: Show relation hints in v2 format

dedup.description: Deduplicate similar memories in v2 format
